pipeline.title: NovaStar AI deal stalling in negotiation
pipeline.description: $200K deal has been in negotiation for 15 days — 2x average for this stage. Last activity was 5 days ago. Risk of going dark.

pipeline.title: Meridian Health proposal overdue
pipeline.description: $150K deal has been in proposal stage for 20 days with close date of April 5. Proposal may need refreshing or champion re-engagement.

pipeline.title: Strong Q2 pipeline building
pipeline.description: 3 new deals added to discovery stage this week totaling $335K. Weighted pipeline up 12% week-over-week.

competitive.title: New Relic launched consumption pricing
competitive.description: New Relic eliminated per-seat licensing in favor of consumption-based pricing. This could impact our mid-market positioning against them — update battlecards.

competitive.title: Grafana Labs Series D announcement
competitive.description: Grafana Labs raised $240M at $6B valuation, signaling major push into enterprise observability. Expect increased competitive pressure in open-source-friendly accounts.

competitive.title: HubSpot expanding into AI-powered outbound
competitive.description: HubSpot launched AI email writer in Sales Hub. Feature parity increasing in mid-market CRM segment.

accounts.title: Figma Dev Mode went GA
accounts.description: Figma launched Dev Mode to general availability — expanding their platform surface area. Good trigger for outreach to their engineering leadership about observability needs.

accounts.title: Notion crossed 100M users
accounts.description: Notion announced 100M+ users milestone. Their enterprise push is accelerating — revisit our outbound sequence targeting their RevOps team.

accounts.title: Stripe layoffs in recruiting team
accounts.description: Stripe reduced recruiting team by 15%. Not affecting engineering or sales orgs. Monitor but no immediate action needed on our active deal.

market.title: AI observability becoming a category
market.description: Three new startups announced AI/ML observability products this month. Market is validating the need — position our AI monitoring capabilities in upcoming demos.

market.title: SOC 2 becoming table stakes for Series A+
market.description: Seeing increasing pattern of Series A+ companies requiring SOC 2 compliance from vendors. Ensure our compliance story is front and center in enterprise deals.

market.title: DevOps hiring down 8% QoQ
market.description: Job postings for DevOps/SRE roles declined 8% quarter-over-quarter. Platform engineering roles up 15%. Adjust messaging from 'DevOps tools' to 'platform engineering'.
